criteria.name: Draft Status Integrity
criteria.requirement: Draft status block preserves internal_draft_created and all blocked publication statuses.
criteria.failure_condition: Missing status fields or route/sitemap/publication eligibility implied.
criteria.validation_notes: No numeric scoring. No publication authorization.

criteria.name: Required Section Completeness
criteria.requirement: All required sections from blueprint contract are present.
criteria.validation_notes: Conditional sections included where blueprint requires.

criteria.name: Reference Substance
criteria.requirement: Draft carries governed reference substance, not generic commentary.

criteria.name: Definition and Scope Clarity
criteria.requirement: Definitions and scope boundaries are precise and bounded.

criteria.name: Governance Boundary Clarity
criteria.requirement: Governance boundary section states what draft must not be read as.
criteria.validation_notes: Repository visibility distinguished from site publicity.

criteria.name: Claim Scope Discipline
criteria.requirement: Claims remain internal governance scope only.
criteria.validation_notes: No truth certification or external validation.

criteria.name: Source Scope Discipline
criteria.requirement: Source scope limited to repository governance documents.

criteria.name: Semantic SEO Boundary Discipline
criteria.requirement: Semantic SEO role remains internal planning only.
criteria.failure_condition: Public metadata or SEO expansion implied.
criteria.validation_notes: No public title, meta, canonical, or schema deployment.

criteria.name: Prohibited Misreading Protection
criteria.requirement: Prohibited misreadings section blocks common misinterpretations.
criteria.validation_notes: Includes tool, verdict, and publication misreadings.

criteria.name: Internal Link Plan Discipline
criteria.requirement: Internal link plan describes conceptual dependencies only.
criteria.failure_condition: Public navigation or route registry changes implied.

criteria.name: Structured Data Boundary
criteria.requirement: Structured data boundary prohibits product/service schema on public surfaces.
criteria.failure_condition: Schema deployment or public structured data implied.

criteria.name: Interface Boundary
criteria.requirement: Draft does not imply public interface or embodiment availability.
criteria.failure_condition: UI product or operational interface implied.

criteria.name: Security Privacy Boundary
criteria.requirement: Draft does not imply data collection, upload, or analytics surfaces.
criteria.failure_condition: Upload, forms, or analytics workflow implied.

criteria.name: Non-Authorization Strength
criteria.requirement: Non-authorization statement explicitly blocks routes, sitemap, metadata, publication, deployment.

criteria.name: Forbidden Language Safety
criteria.requirement: No detector, classifier, upload, scoring, fake-real verdict, or tool language without prohibition context.
criteria.failure_condition: Forbidden implication detected in affirmative context.

criteria.name: Public Surface Safety
criteria.requirement: Draft remains non-site-public with no public readiness claims.
criteria.failure_condition: Publication, route, or deployment readiness claimed.

criteria.name: Word Count and Substance Control
criteria.requirement: Draft remains between 900 and 1400 words with controlled substance.
criteria.failure_condition: Below minimum or above maximum word count.
criteria.validation_notes: Word count is substance control, not SEO target.
